sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ الطِّفْلُ أَبَاهُ: مِنْ أَيْنَ تَأْتِي النُّقُودُ؟
sentences.translation: Dijete je pitalo oca: Odakle dolazi novac?
sentences.translationEn: The child asked his father: Where does money come from?

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ الأَبُ: النَّاسُ يَعْمَلُونَ وَيَأْخُذُونَ أَجْرًا.
sentences.translation: Otac je odgovorio: Ljudi rade i dobivaju platu.
sentences.translationEn: The father answered: People work and receive wages.

sentences.arabic: فَهِمَ الطِّفْلُ أَنَّ العَمَلَ يُعْطِي النُّقُودَ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je shvatilo da rad donosi novac.
sentences.translationEn: The child understood that work brings money.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يَعْمَلَ بِجِدٍّ عِنْدَمَا يَكْبَرُ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je da radi marljivo kad odraste.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to work hard when he grows up.
